work_unit: fix(asr): PA-AUD-H-001 restore scan_once/run_loop to IngestionPipeline + PA-AUD-M-004 cap StubTranscriber txt read at 1MB
situation: audit-2026-07-08-042 derived_fixes PA-AUD-H-001 (high) + PA-AUD-M-004 (medium) pending. asr.py:186 scan_once and :199 run_loop orphaned outside IngestionPipeline class at module scope — any call via pipeline.scan_once() raises AttributeError, making ingestion main loop unreachable. StubTranscriber.transcribe unbounded read_text on inbox .txt files risks OOM on large/malicious input.
action: Moved scan_once + run_loop back into IngestionPipeline class body (after _analytics, before query_habits). Added 1MB cap on StubTranscriber .txt reads with truncation warning. Verified via python import that both methods are now in IngestionPipeline.__dict__. Committed via opt-worktree.sh to new worktree opt-asr-fix-1783385302 (route-fix, new area asr-fix). Branch pushed to origin/auto/opt-asr-fix-1783385302.

audit_findings.finding: scan_once defined at module scope after query_habits(), uses self but not inside any class — AttributeError on pipeline.scan_once()
audit_findings.remediation: Move scan_once + run_loop into IngestionPipeline class body

audit_findings.finding: StubTranscriber.transcribe calls p.read_text() with no size limit — OOM risk on large inbox .txt
audit_findings.remediation: Cap read at 1MB via f.read(MAX_TXT_BYTES) with truncation warning
